title: VACCINATIONS AND TUBERCULOSIS SCREENINGS - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINATIONS AND TUBERCULOSIS SCREENINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides age-appropriate immunizations for children and adults. Tuberculosis screenings are also available. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 302 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12 and 1-5pm Email (503) 623-8175 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-8175 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment, walk-ins are welcome, but available on a limited basis. FEES: Accepts OHP insurance. No child under 18 will be turned away from receiving vaccinations because of inability to pay. Limited adult flu vaccine available for those without insurance. Unable to bill Medicare for any vaccines. DOCUMENTS: Vaccination record and insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County and surrounding area SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Tuberculosis Screening Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. POLK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
